text: this is 6 Minute English from BBC Learning English. I'm Neil. And I'm Bekka.
zh: [0] 这里是BBC英语学习频道的《六分钟英语》。我是Neil。我是Bekka。

text: Cycling is a popular activity in Britain. Yes.
zh: [1] 骑自行车在英国是一项很受欢迎的活动。是的。

text: This year, sales of bicycles – or bikes, as they're usually called – are up in Britain.
zh: [2] 今年,英国自行车——也就是人们常说的bike——的销量在上升。

text: Many people choose cycling because it's good for their health and the environment.
zh: [3] 很多人选择骑自行车,因为这有益于健康和环境。

text: And electric bikes are making cycling accessible to more people, including older people.
zh: [4] 电动自行车让更多人,包括老年人,也能享受骑行的乐趣。

text: In this episode, we'll visit two countries, one with a long history of cycling and another where it's just getting started.
zh: [5] 在这一集里,我们将走访两个国家,一个有着悠久的骑行历史,另一个才刚刚起步。

text: And as usual, we'll be learning some useful new words and phrases.
zh: [6] 像往常一样,我们会学习一些有用的新词汇和短语。

text: And remember, you'll find all the vocabulary from this episode on our website, bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: [7] 记住,你可以在我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com上找到本期节目的所有词汇。

text: But first, Neil, I have a question about a country that's world famous for its bikes,
zh: [8] 不过,Neil,我先有个问题,是关于一个以自行车闻名世界的国家的,

text: the Netherlands, also often referred to as Holland.
zh: [9] 那就是荷兰,也常被称为Holland。

text: The Netherlands cycle network spreads over 95 ,000 miles and
zh: [10] 荷兰的自行车道网络总长达9.5万英里,

text: there are more bikes in the country than its 18 million citizens.
zh: [11] 而且这个国家的自行车数量比它1800万公民还要多。

text: So, roughly speaking, how many bikes are there in the Netherlands?
zh: [12] 那么,大致来说,荷兰有多少辆自行车呢?

text: Is it A. 20 million, B. 24 million or C. 34 million?
Well, I'm going to say C. 34 million.
Ah, well, we'll reveal the correct answer later in the programme.
zh: [15] 好,我们会在节目稍后揭晓正确答案。

text: Staying in the Netherlands, let's hear from Meredith Glaeser, CEO of Amsterdam's urban cycling institution.
zh: [16] 还是说回荷兰,我们来听听阿姆斯特丹城市骑行机构首席执行官Meredith Glaeser的说法。

text: Here, Meredith tells BBC World Service programme, The Enquiry, more about Dutch people's love of cycling.
zh: [17] 在这里,Meredith向BBC世界服务节目《The Enquiry》讲述了荷兰人对骑行的热爱。

text: The bicycle is deeply ingrained into Dutch culture.
zh: [18] 自行车已经深深植根于荷兰文化之中。

text: But the rise of cycling started in in the industrial era when bicycle manufacturing took off.
zh: [19] 但骑行热潮的兴起始于工业时代,当时自行车制造业开始腾飞。

text: And it went from a toy for rich people to an everyday tool for transportation.
zh: [20] 自行车也从富人的玩具变成了日常出行工具。

text: And this was a really important milestone for cycling in the Netherlands.
zh: [21] 这对荷兰的骑行发展来说是一个非常重要的里程碑。

text: Cycling is deeply ingrained into Dutch culture.
zh: [22] 骑行已经深深植根于荷兰文化之中。

text: Deeply ingrained are two words that go together
zh: [23] “deeply ingrained”是两个常搭配使用的词,

text: commonly, and it means something that's firmly established within a person or culture and unlikely to change.
zh: [24] 意思是某种东西在一个人或一种文化中根深蒂固,不太可能改变。

text: During the 1890s, bike manufacturing took off in the
zh: [25] 在19世纪90年代,自行车制造业在

text: Netherlands. Take -off is a phrasal verb meaning to suddenly become popular or successful.
zh: [26] 荷兰迅速兴起。“Take off”是一个短语动词,意思是突然变得流行或成功。

text: Certain brands became symbols of a new, comfortable style of bike.
zh: [27] 某些品牌成为了一种新型舒适自行车风格的象征。

text: New factories made bikes cheaper to buy. This was a milestone for cycling in the
zh: [28] 新工厂让自行车的价格变得更便宜。这是荷兰骑行发展史上的一个里程碑。

text: Netherlands. A milestone is an important event in someone's life or in the development of something.
zh: [29] “Milestone”指某人生活中或某事发展过程中的重要事件。

text: Our second destination is better known for cars than bicycles – the United Arab Emirates, or UAE.
zh: [30] 我们的第二个目的地以汽车而非自行车闻名——阿联酋。

text: is hoping cycling could be a greener way
zh: [31] 阿联酋希望骑行能成为一种更环保的方式,

text: for visitors to explore tourist attractions in cities like Dubai and Abu Dhabi.
zh: [32] 让游客游览迪拜和阿布扎比等城市的旅游景点。

text: Transport consultant Martin Tillman, who lives in the Gulf region, explained more to BBC World Service programme The Enquiry.
zh: [33] 常住海湾地区的交通顾问Martin Tillman向BBC世界服务节目《The Enquiry》做了详细解释。

text: Martin Tillman, Transport Consultant, UAE World Service Programme We also have quality of life and livability. All the cities in the Gulf are very competitive
zh: [34] 交通顾问Martin Tillman在阿联酋世界服务节目中说,我们也很看重生活质量和宜居性。海湾地区的所有城市竞争都很激烈,

text: and they would love to be ranked very high in those global rankings and cycling is seen as part of that quality of life solution.
zh: [35] 它们都希望在这些全球排名中名列前茅,而骑行被视为提升生活质量方案的一部分。

text: Gulf cities like Dubai want a reputation as places with a good quality of life.
zh: [36] 迪拜等海湾城市希望树立生活质量高的美誉。

text: The phrase quality of life refers to someone's level of enjoyment, comfort and health when living in a particular place.
zh: [37] “Quality of life”这个短语指一个人在特定地方生活时所感受到的愉悦、舒适和健康程度。

text: It's a measure of a person's overall wellbeing. being.
zh: [38] 这是衡量一个人整体幸福感的标准。

text: Gulf cities are also interested in liveability – the degree to which somewhere is a pleasant place to
zh: [39] 海湾城市也很关注“livability”(宜居性)——即某地作为居住地的宜人程度。

text: live. Cycling is good for mental as well as physical health,
zh: [40] 骑行不仅对身体有益,对心理健康也有好处,

text: and Dubai's town planners are hoping the 600 kilometres of cycle tracks already built will make the city more attractive to live in.
zh: [41] 迪拜的城市规划者希望,已建成的600公里自行车道能让这座城市更宜居。

text: Of course, there are big differences between the Netherlands and UAE.
zh: [42] 当然,荷兰和阿联酋之间存在很大差异。

text: The temperature for one, which in Dubai regularly hits 45 degrees Celsius.
zh: [43] 首先是气温,迪拜的气温经常高达45摄氏度。

text: Martin told BBC World Service's The Inquiry that
zh: [44] Martin告诉BBC世界服务的《The Inquiry》节目,

text: Dubai is studying countries like the Netherlands, not to copy them, but to discover what works.
zh: [45] 迪拜正在研究荷兰这样的国家,不是为了照搬,而是为了发现哪些做法真正有效。

text: It's certainly not a copy and paste of what is good in Holland or Denmark, but the key is that we're looking for the principles.
zh: [46] 这绝不是简单地照搬荷兰或丹麦的成功经验,关键在于我们要寻找其中的原则。

text: Cycling in UAE isn't a copy and paste of cycling in Holland.
zh: [47] 阿联酋的骑行方式并不是照搬荷兰的模式。

text: Martin uses the phrase a copy and paste to mean an exact copy of something which is moved and put somewhere else.
zh: [48] Martin用“a copy and paste”来表示把某样东西原封不动地复制并搬到别处。

text: Dubai can't simply copy the Netherlands and
zh: [49] 迪拜不能简单地照搬荷兰的模式,

text: a range of measures, including water stations and shaded rest areas, have been created for cycling in the heat.
zh: [50] 为了应对高温骑行,已经采取了一系列措施,包括设立供水站和遮阳休息区。

text: Cycling isn't the perfect solution for everyone, everywhere, but in some places it can be a popular and green alternative.
zh: [51] 骑行并不是适用于所有地方、所有人的完美方案,但在某些地方,它可以成为一种受欢迎的绿色出行方式。

text: Yes, just look at the Netherlands and that reminds me of your question, Becca.
zh: [52] 是啊,看看荷兰就知道了,这也让我想起了你之前的问题,Becca。

text: Ah yes, I asked you roughly how many bikes are there in the Netherlands?
zh: [53] 对了,我问你荷兰大约有多少辆自行车。

text: I said 34 million. Was I right? There are certainly a lot of bikes in the Netherlands.
zh: [54] 我说的是3400万。我说对了吗?荷兰的自行车确实很多。

text: However, there are only, roughly, 24 million bikes.
zh: [55] 不过,大约只有2400万辆。

text: Only? That's still quite a lot! Right, let's recap the vocabulary we've learnt,
zh: [56] 只有?那也已经很多了!好,我们来回顾一下今天学到的词汇,

text: starting with deeply ingrained – a combination of words meaning well -established and unlikely to change.
zh: [57] 首先是“deeply ingrained”——两个词组合在一起,表示根深蒂固、不易改变。

text: If something takes off, it suddenly becomes popular or successful.
zh: [58] 如果某事物“takes off”,意思是它突然变得流行或成功。

text: A milestone is an important event in the development of something or someone.
zh: [59] “Milestone”指某人或某事物发展过程中的重要事件。

text: Quality of life describes a person's wellbeing in terms of their level of enjoyment, comfort and health.
zh: [60] “Quality of life”描述一个人在愉悦、舒适和健康方面的幸福感。

text: The noun livability means the degree to which a place is pleasant to live in.
zh: [61] 名词“livability”指一个地方适宜居住的程度。

text: And finally, a copy and paste is an exact copy of something which is then moved and put somewhere else.
zh: [62] 最后,“a copy and paste”指把某样东西原封不动地复制并搬到别处。

text: Once again, our six minutes are up, but remember you can find a transcript and a worksheet
zh: [63] 我们的六分钟又到了,不过别忘了,你可以在我们的网站

text: and a quiz all over on our website at bbclearningenglish .com. Goodbye for now. Bye!
zh: [64] bbclearningenglish.com上找到文字稿、练习题和小测验。再见啦!再见!
